title: Oasis Plastic Backed Floral Foam Casket Tray 60cm (23.5")
features: A strong injection moulded plastic tray filled with water absorbing floral foam used for creating flower arrangements.
table centres and funeral tributes. Size: 60 x 21 x 8cm (23.5 x 7.5 x 3”)
Plastic lip – provides support for foliage and decorative ribbon
Flowers can live up to 50% longer compared to previous foam in new OASIS Floral Foam Maxlife Foam
OASIS Brand - The world’s best selling floral foam. Manufactured in the UK
description: Product Description OASIS® Casket Tray is the all round product that makes small work of large arrangements. Fantastic for creating funeral coffin-top arrangements, table decorations and function flowers. Developed in 1975 these bases were initially invented for funeral work. These days their versatility has made it one of the most popular floristry tools for every type of floristry. OASIS® NAYLORBASE® Floral Bases offer total design versatility and guarantee perfect holding conditions for your designs. Ready to use, there is no time wasting prep to slow you down. Since their earliest days in 1954, when V.L. Smithers revolutionised the floral industry with the creation of water-absorbing foam for florists, Smithers-Oasis has grown into a leading global manufacturer and marketer of floral foam, floral accessory products, cellular growing media, and postharvest products. Today, OASIS® is the most recognised and trusted brand in the floral industry.Made from OASIS® Brand Floral Foam Maxlife which offers consistent quality, the OASIS® Casket Tray has an injection moulded base which provides supreme strength and stability. With a plastic lip to provide support for foliage and ribbon and pre-applied anti-slip feet for fantastic grip, the OASIS® Casket Tray makes small work of large arrangements. Box Contains 1 x OASIS® Plastic Backed Floral Foam Casket Tray 60cm (23.5")
